nasb.text: “The kings came and fought; Then fought the kings of Canaan At Taanach near the waters of Megiddo; They took no plunder in silver.

esv.text: “The kings came, they fought; then fought the kings of Canaan, at Taanach, by the waters of Megiddo; they got no spoils of silver.

cnv.text: 眾王都來爭戰； 那時迦南眾王爭戰， 在米吉多水亭的他納爭戰， 卻沒有取得銀錢。

ccb.text: “迦南诸王来战， 来到米吉多河边的他纳交战， 却没有掠走金银。
